zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD整体维持震荡偏弱整理结构，价格多次在66000下方受压运行，短线反弹缺乏持续性，市场情绪偏谨慎，多头推进力度不足，短期或延续弱势震荡格局，需关注下方支撑测试情况及成交量变化

技术指标方面，价格跌破20日均线66041附近，形成短期压制，MACD持续处于零轴下方并维持负值动能，显示空头占优，RSI暂缺但整体偏弱信号一致，短线反弹空间受限，需警惕进一步下探风险

支撑位关注65650附近低点区域，若跌破可能进一步测试65500一线；上方阻力集中在65880及66040均线附近，区间突破前维持震荡思路，需等待方向选择确认，关注成交量配合

交易策略上建议以区间思路为主，高位谨慎追多，反弹至阻力区可分批减仓或布局空单，低位企稳再考虑轻仓试多，严格控制止损风险，避免情绪化交易

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently consolidating after a mild 24-hour pullback, with price action hovering near the lower edge of its short-term range. Trading remains slightly bearish as price sits below the 20-period simple moving average, signaling weakening upward momentum. Recent attempts to push higher have failed to sustain traction above intraday highs, suggesting that buyers are losing short-term control while market structure shifts into a more cautious, range-bound environment.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD is currently negative at -97.90809, reflecting continued bearish momentum and suggesting sellers still dominate short-term direction. With no RSI reading provided, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be confirmed, leaving MACD as the primary momentum guide. Trading below the 20-day SMA around 66,041 further emphasizes weakening trend strength and a potential shift toward continued consolidation or downside pressure if buying volume does not increase.

Immediate support is located near the session low around 65,654, a level that has been repeatedly tested during the current consolidation phase. A break below this zone could expose the psychological 65,000 area, followed by deeper support near 64,200. On the upside, initial resistance aligns with the 20-period SMA at 66,041, and a sustained move above this level may open the path toward 66,500 and 67,200.

Trading conditions favor a cautious approach as price remains below key short-term averages. Short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies, selling near resistance levels and taking partial profits into weakness around support. A confirmed breakout above 66,041 would be required to shift bias toward bullish continuation, while failure to reclaim this level increases the probability of further downside testing. Risk management remains essential given the tight intraday volatility.
